hyperedges.label: Agentic loop: API streaming + tool execution + alternating message roles

nodes.label: Claude Code (upstream reference: 512K LOC, 1902 files, ~50 tools)
nodes.norm_label: claude code (upstream reference: 512k loc, 1902 files, ~50 tools)

nodes.label: v0: Chatbot baseline (streaming REPL, no tools, ~80 lines)
nodes.norm_label: v0: chatbot baseline (streaming repl, no tools, ~80 lines)

nodes.label: v1: Agentic tool-use loop (REPL + 6 tools, ~900 lines)
nodes.norm_label: v1: agentic tool-use loop (repl + 6 tools, ~900 lines)

nodes.label: v2: Markdown rendering (two-pass: stream raw then re-render)
nodes.norm_label: v2: markdown rendering (two-pass: stream raw then re-render)

nodes.label: v3: Permission confirmation + Bash safety (two-tier risk classification)
nodes.norm_label: v3: permission confirmation + bash safety (two-tier risk classification)

nodes.label: v4: Session persistence + resume (auto-save raw message array)
nodes.norm_label: v4: session persistence + resume (auto-save raw message array)

nodes.label: v5: Smart conversation compaction (model summarizes itself at 75% threshold)
nodes.norm_label: v5: smart conversation compaction (model summarizes itself at 75% threshold)

nodes.label: v7: Sub-agent tool (isolated, read-only, up to 20 turns)
nodes.norm_label: v7: sub-agent tool (isolated, read-only, up to 20 turns)

nodes.label: v8: CLI args + non-interactive print mode
nodes.norm_label: v8: cli args + non-interactive print mode

nodes.label: Messages array (client-side state, raw API format)
nodes.norm_label: messages array (client-side state, raw api format)

nodes.label: Convention: tool_result delivered as user-role message
nodes.norm_label: convention: tool_result delivered as user-role message

nodes.label: Two-pass rendering: stream raw text then ANSI-erase and re-render
nodes.norm_label: two-pass rendering: stream raw text then ansi-erase and re-render

nodes.label: Two-tier risk classification: safe / write / destructive (regex-based)
nodes.norm_label: two-tier risk classification: safe / write / destructive (regex-based)

nodes.label: Design principle: confirmation, not prevention -- user makes dangerous actions a conscious choice
nodes.norm_label: design principle: confirmation, not prevention -- user makes dangerous actions a conscious choice

nodes.label: Sessions saved as raw API message array (no parsing on resume)
nodes.norm_label: sessions saved as raw api message array (no parsing on resume)

nodes.label: Smart compaction algorithm: keep last 2 + summarize rest + ack
nodes.norm_label: smart compaction algorithm: keep last 2 + summarize rest + ack

nodes.label: Context window management (200K tokens, 75% threshold leaves 25% buffer)
nodes.norm_label: context window management (200k tokens, 75% threshold leaves 25% buffer)

nodes.label: Multi-level CLAUDE.md: ~/.claude + project root + .claude + cwd (concatenated, gitignore-style)
nodes.norm_label: multi-level claude.md: ~/.claude + project root + .claude + cwd (concatenated, gitignore-style)

nodes.label: Persistent memory: key-value markdown in ~/.nano-claude/memory/ injected into system prompt
nodes.norm_label: persistent memory: key-value markdown in ~/.nano-claude/memory/ injected into system prompt

nodes.label: Sub-agent security boundary: only Read/Glob/Grep, no Bash/Write/Edit
nodes.norm_label: sub-agent security boundary: only read/glob/grep, no bash/write/edit

nodes.label: Print mode: plain text, no tool noise, auto-allow permissions, exit after model done
nodes.norm_label: print mode: plain text, no tool noise, auto-allow permissions, exit after model done

nodes.label: Key takeaway: the model IS the agent; code is just harness for tools+context
nodes.norm_label: key takeaway: the model is the agent; code is just harness for tools+context

nodes.label: System prompt assembly: CORE_PROMPT + env + git + CLAUDE.md + memories
nodes.norm_label: system prompt assembly: core_prompt + env + git + claude.md + memories

nodes.label: src/index.ts (Entry + REPL + CLI args + slash commands)
nodes.norm_label: src/index.ts (entry + repl + cli args + slash commands)

nodes.label: Orange blocky humanoid/creature figure with two black square eyes
nodes.norm_label: orange blocky humanoid/creature figure with two black square eyes
